title: Building Great Agent Skills: The Missing Manual
reasoning: Highly actionable technical manual for developers looking to understand production-grade AI agent engineering.
summary: As a junior fullstack engineer, knowing how to build and orchestrate production-grade AI agents is the ultimate career cheat code right now. This video bypasses the high-level AI hype to give you a concrete, engineering-first manual for building reliable agent workflows that scale.

title: The Future Is Domain-Specific Agents - Justin Schroeder, StandardAgents
reasoning: Incredibly strategic forward-looking analysis of where software architecture is moving, crucial for early-career fullstack devs.
summary: The software development landscape is rapidly shifting from writing basic boilerplate to orchestrating specialized AI architectures. This talk explains why domain-specific agents are the future, equipping you with the architectural foresight to future-proof your engineering stack and stand out in the job market.
